title: 已經有人用App申請而獲批BNO Visa!!!!

replies.msg:
關於BN(O) visa，由於小編有朋友2月23日喺香港申請後，已經喺噚日批咗。小編建議如各位唔爭在幾百港蚊匯率，請繼續以CNY付款。內政部應該喺政治上將香港當做中國一部分，再冇HKSAR呢個選項。

另外，當日5點前用舊版申請（即首階段）而被要求前往簽證中心登記嘅各位:，如閣下喺香港遞交申請，可以用以下連結填寫收回申請的form ( Application for a Visa for UK Refund)用電郵寄去電郵地址：ukvirefundsteam@homeoffice.gov.uk，申請退返申請費。申請理由必須要提及: We would like to reapply through the UK Immigration ID Check app.
https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/application-for-a-visa4uk-application-refund

https://www.facebook.com/490982747916524/posts/1542540896094032/?d=n

quote.msg: 咁之後申請永居係visa到期日就申請得，定計到步後5年？好混亂

replies.msg:
It is essential that you apply before your current leave expires, or you risk becoming an overstayer.

The earliest possible application date is 28 days before the five-year anniversary of the granting of leave to enter the UK (i.e. not the date you actually entered the UK).

quote.msg: 咁之後申請永居係visa到期日就申請得，定計到步後5年？好混亂

It is essential that you apply before your current leave expires, or you risk becoming an overstayer.

The earliest possible application date is 28 days before the five-year anniversary of the granting of leave to enter the UK (i.e. not the date you actually entered the UK).

2020年 Home Office 文件，應該適用於所有ILR申請, 第9頁有講：

Indefinite leave to remain: calculating continuous period in UK

https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/government/uploads/system/uploads/attachment_data/file/939345/calculating-continuous-period-v22.0ext.pdf

replies.msg:
你呢個唔適用於BNO visa
About this guidance
This guidance tells you how to calculate the 5-year continuous lawful period in the
UK requirement for applicants applying for settlement on the following routes:
• domestic workers in private households, paragraph 159G
• dependants of a Tier 1 Entrepreneur and T1 Investor, paragraph 319AA
• tier 1 (Entrepreneur), paragraph 245DF and Appendix A Table 6
• tier 1 (Investor) 245E to 245EF and Appendix A Table 9A
• retired person of independent means (paragraph 269)
The following categories are also covered by this guidance which allow accelerated
settlement:
• tier 1 (Entrepreneur) (paragraph 245DF)
• tier 1 (Investor) (paragraph 245EF)

呢個先係
https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/government/uploads/system/uploads/attachment_data/file/962925/appendix-continuous-residence.pdf

quote.msg:
2020年 Home Office 文件，應該適用於所有ILR申請, 第9頁有講：

Indefinite leave to remain: calculating continuous period in UK

https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/government/uploads/system/uploads/attachment_data/file/939345/calculating-continuous-period-v22.0ext.pdf

你呢個唔適用於BNO visa
About this guidance
This guidance tells you how to calculate the 5-year continuous lawful period in the
UK requirement for applicants applying for settlement on the following routes:
• domestic workers in private households, paragraph 159G
• dependants of a Tier 1 Entrepreneur and T1 Investor, paragraph 319AA
• tier 1 (Entrepreneur), paragraph 245DF and Appendix A Table 6
• tier 1 (Investor) 245E to 245EF and Appendix A Table 9A
• retired person of independent means (paragraph 269)
The following categories are also covered by this guidance which allow accelerated
settlement:
• tier 1 (Entrepreneur) (paragraph 245DF)
• tier 1 (Investor) (paragraph 245EF)

呢個先係
https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/government/uploads/system/uploads/attachment_data/file/962925/appendix-continuous-residence.pdf

關於BN(O) visa，由於小編有朋友2月23日喺香港申請後，已經喺噚日批咗。小編建議如各位唔爭在幾百港蚊匯率，請繼續以CNY付款。內政部應該喺政治上將香港當做中國一部分，再冇HKSAR呢個選項。

另外，當日5點前用舊版申請（即首階段）而被要求前往簽證中心登記嘅各位:，如閣下喺香港遞交申請，可以用以下連結填寫收回申請的form ( Application for a Visa for UK Refund)用電郵寄去電郵地址：ukvirefundsteam@homeoffice.gov.uk，申請退返申請費。申請理由必須要提及: We would like to reapply through the UK Immigration ID Check app.

pinned.msg:
It is essential that you apply before your current leave expires, or you risk becoming an overstayer.

The earliest possible application date is 28 days before the five-year anniversary of the granting of leave to enter the UK (i.e. not the date you actually entered the UK).
